ABOUT |
ABOUT ✕

My name is Max Ettinghausen and I am a 23-year-old trying to navigate life, relationships, career, and the endless pursuit of improvement. In the chaos of it all, which I thoroughly enjoy, I wanted to create something tangible that I could showcase.

I got to a point where consuming content wasn't enough — I wanted to create something tangible with the knowledge, ideas, and skills I have accumulated along the way. This digital repository is my attempt at creating in a world that pushes consumption over everything.

Being able to simultaneously let my creative spirit run free while learning how to leverage and use such a powerful tool like Claude Code has been extremely rewarding. I look forward to improving and adding to this living repository as time goes on.

SOMETHING TO FALL BACK ON.
